title: Controls Property
description: Array of controls in the form. Used to access control properties with an index
notes: Use the Controls property to access controls on the form using an index. This allows you to iterate through the control collection and get or set common properties.
examples:
Integer i, count
String type$
GGet frmMain.Controls.Count, count
For i = 1 To count
   GGet frmMain.Controls(i).Type, type$
   If type$ = "Button" Then
      GSet frmMain.Controls(i).Enabled, False
   EndIf
Next i
